name: Drawer
description: Drawer is a panel component displayed as an overlay at the edges of the screen.

props.name: visible
props.description: Specifies the visibility of the dialog.

props.name: position
props.description: Specifies the position of the drawer.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: dismissable
props.description: Whether clicking outside closes the panel.

props.name: showCloseIcon
props.description: Whether to display a close icon inside the panel.

props.name: closeButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass the custom value to read for the button inside the component.

props.name: closeIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the drawer close button.

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether to a modal layer behind the drawer.

props.name: blockScroll
props.description: Whether background scroll should be blocked when drawer is visible.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Specifies if pressing escape key should hide the drawer.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback to invoke when drawer is shown.

events.name: before-hide
events.description: Callback to invoke before drawer gets hidden.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback to invoke when drawer gets hidden.

events.name: after-hide
events.description: Callback to invoke after drawer is hidden.

events.name: after-show
events.description: Callback to invoke after drawer is shown.

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the header title */ class: any; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom header template. @param {Object} scope - header slot's params.

slots.name: closeicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the close icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Close drawer function. */ closeCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
